nodes.title: Checkpoint — SD 1.5 base (or any SD 1.5 finetune)
Positive prompt — paste resolved prompt from art_specs
widgets_values:
PASTE RESOLVED PROMPT FROM art_specs/<faction>/<card_id>.md HERE.

The spec already concatenates the five locked layers per pipeline_spec.md section 3:
global_style + faction_style + subject_description + composition + quality_tags

NOTE — SD 1.5 FALLBACK: spec prompts were authored against the SDXL stack. They will run unchanged here, but expect lower fidelity vs SDXL: less faithful long prompt understanding, weaker hands/faces, lower native resolution. Use this workflow only when SDXL is not viable on the operator's hardware.

--- DEFAULT SCAFFOLD (replace when pasting from a spec) ---

masterpiece, magic the gathering card art, oil painting, painterly,
photographic depth, low-key lighting, cinematic, atmospheric,
dark fantasy, grimdark, gallows-haunted mood, doomed grandeur,
muted earth-tone palette, single accent colour focal,
in the style of Steve Argyle and Volkan Baga,

[FACTION_STYLE_BLOCK from pipeline_spec.md section 3.2 — pick one of the five],

[SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION from this card's spec file, max ~30 words],

upper body portrait, three-quarter pose, looking-into-camera,
single focal figure dominating frame, atmospheric blurred background,
volumetric haze, no text overlay, no logo, no watermark,

extremely detailed, sharp focus, professional, intricate brushwork,
volumetric lighting, oil-paint texture visible in highlights,
highres, hyper-detailed, masterpiece quality

nodes.title: Negative prompt — LOCKED, do not edit
widgets_values:
anime, cartoon, cel shaded, disney, pixar, chibi, kawaii,
clean fantasy, bright saturated colours, oversaturated,
modern clothing, modern weapons, anachronisms,
text, watermark, signature, logo, frame, border, UI elements,
3d render, plastic, smooth skin, airbrushed, photoreal-realistic,
explicit gore, severed limbs, exposed organs, blood pools,
deformed hands, extra fingers, extra limbs, malformed face,
blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, low resolution

nodes.title: KSampler — locked: DPM++ 2M Karras / 30 steps / CFG 6.5

groups.title: 2. Prompt + latent (architecture identical to SDXL workflow)

extra.source_of_truth: pipeline_spec.md sections 2.3, 3.1, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6 (LoRA stack from §2.2 NOT applied — see lora_status below)
extra.purpose: Fallback workflow for hardware that cannot run SDXL (Paul's RTX 2050 ~4GB VRAM falls in this band per memory file project_gaming_app_hardware.md). Same prompt + sampler + dimensions architecture as workflow_gallowfell_card.json so per-card art_specs files paste in unchanged. Expected to produce lower-fidelity output than SDXL — use only when SDXL is not viable.
extra.edit_policy: Only the positive prompt text is player-editable. Sampler / steps / CFG / dimensions / negative prompt / checkpoint are LOCKED to keep outputs reproducible across operators.
extra.dimensions_note: 512×768 is SD 1.5's native portrait aspect, matching the 2:3 ratio of the SDXL workflow's 832×1216. Card art for the in-game CardView is then upscaled or used at native res. Do not change dimensions — anything other than 512×768 / 768×512 / 512×512 in SD 1.5 produces composition drift and duplicate-subject artefacts.
extra.lora_status: ALL LoRAs from the SDXL workflow are dropped here. Of the 10 LoRAs in pipeline_setup/loras_resolved.md, 4 are SDXL-explicit by name (ClassipeintXL, RPGNightmareXL, Swamp people SDXL, Mythical Forest Style [SDXL]) and the remaining 6 have unverified SD 1.5 availability. Rather than ship unverified placeholders, this workflow runs base SD 1.5 with prompt-only style targeting (named-artist + named-aesthetic tags in the prompt). To restore LoRA parity, queue a future heartbeat task 'D-LORA-SD15: research SD 1.5 equivalents for the 10 SDXL LoRAs' — but only if a real operator hits this fallback and SD 1.5 base output proves insufficient. Cheapest path is to defer.
extra.expected_checkpoint: v1-5-pruned-emaonly.safetensors is the canonical SD 1.5 base. Better-quality SD 1.5 finetunes the operator may swap in: RealisticVision_v51, DreamShaper_v8, RevAnimated_v122, AbsoluteReality_v18. Painterly-leaning SD 1.5 finetunes will give better Gallowfell results than the canonical base. To swap, change the widget value above to the .safetensors filename of the finetune.
extra.spec_compatibility: Per-card art spec files under art_specs/<faction>/ paste into node 2 (Positive prompt) unchanged. Seeds in spec files are KSampler-honoured the same way (paste seed into node 5's first widget value). Faction LoRA-zeroing protocol from the SDXL workflow does not apply here — there are no LoRAs to zero.
